metadata.description: A virtual engineering team for solo founders — core skills (plan review, code review, automation pipelines, thinking partners) plus modular stack experts (iOS, Android, AI engineering, Designer, Marketer, Neo4j). Install what you need.

plugins.name: solopreneur
plugins.description: Core skills — plan review, code review loops, backlog management, and thinking partners.

plugins.name: solo-designer
plugins.description: UI/UX design expertise — designer agent and 10 vendored third-party design skills (taste-* archetype family + impeccable).

plugins.name: solo-ios-dev
plugins.description: iOS/macOS SwiftUI expertise — ios-dev agent, ios-patterns, and 23 vendored third-party skills (iphone-apps + asc-* App Store Connect CLI).

plugins.name: solo-android-dev
plugins.description: Android/Kotlin expertise — android-dev agent, android-patterns, and 39 vendored third-party skills (Compose / architecture / Gradle + 18 gplay-* Google Play Console CLI + 6 official Android team skills).

plugins.name: solo-ai-engineer
plugins.description: AI / LLM application engineering expertise — ai-engineer agent plus 1 in-house skill (langgraph) and 3 vendored skills (ai-engineering, senior-prompt-engineer, prompt-architect) for production LLM systems, RAG, agents, and prompt design.

plugins.name: solo-marketer
plugins.description: Marketing / brand / writing expertise — marketer agent plus GTM strategy, naming, X/Twitter & LinkedIn growth, AI-pattern removal, and brand-aware slide design.

plugins.name: solo-neo4j-dev
plugins.description: Neo4j graph database expertise — neo4j-dev agent and 4 vendored third-party skills (cypher / cypher-guide / migration / cli-tools).
